title: 不屈のバーニングハート！！

text_block_list.text:
While I'm out shopping, I notice a group of
Umamusume walking in my direction...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Awww, maaan... We would've won if I'd just
managed to hit that perfect ball in the eighth
inning...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
No, it was my fault! My mess-up in the bottom of
the ninth cost us those runs...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I know! How's about we have a meeting? We can
reflect on the game over some honeyade.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um, well, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! I think I forgot something, so I'm gonna go
grab it! You three can go on without me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: See ya!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Off she goes. Well, we can still grab some
honeyade without her, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, silly me! I forgot something too! Better go
get it before someone else does!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
What?! You too?! Okay, then we can all get some
honeyade together another time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for flaking when it was my idea in the first
place! Catch you guys next time!

I think they're headed under the overpass... I'm a
little curious about why Mejiro Ryan's acting so
strangely, so I decide to check on them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's start with some wall ball drills! About
a hundred should do!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryyyyyan. Did you find what you left behind?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Gah! What are you doing here?! I, uh...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I suddenly got the urge to play a game
of catch! Wanna join me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ines...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's do it!

They're totally silent as they throw the ball back
and forth. All that can be heard is the baseball
cutting through the air and landing in their
gloves.
Thwump...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, Ryan! Throw it back!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...It's still eating away at me. That two-run hit on
my pitch at the bottom of the ninth... It cost us
our lead, and the win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I threw such an easy ball. The more
time passes, the more frustrated I feel.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A loss is a loss, I can accept that. But I didn't
practice enough to know that I did all I could!
And that regret's driving me crazy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
ARRRRRGH! This is eating at me so bad! I wanna
practice harder and get better!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure no one's gonna be able to hit my
pitches! All strikes or nothing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You'll nail it next time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, could you throw me that same pitch from
earlier? The one from the bottom of the ninth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What? You don't have any protective gear on! If
it's a bad ball, you'll get hurt!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'll take any ball you throw at me. I just want you
to trust me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Okay! Then I'm not gonna hold back!

Mejiro Ryan takes a deep breath in... then winds
up a huge pitch.
SWOOOOOSH... DOOMPH!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Your snap's lazy! That's an easy hit! C'mon, put
some power into it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ines... Okay! I'm gonna keep throwing pitches
until we're both satisfied!

The two Umamusume are burning with
competitive spirit... The day they seize victory
doesn't seem too far off now.
